creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pgollucci    2010-09-23 02:38:25 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    security             Makefile 
  Added files:
    security/ccsrch      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    security/ccsrch/files patch-Makefile 
  Log:
  ccsrch is a tool that searches for and identifies unencrypted and
  contiguous credit card numbers (PAN) and track data on windows and
  UNIX operating systems. It will also identify the location of the
  PAN data in the files and record MAC times.
  
  WWW:    http://ccsrch.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/148821
  Submitted by:   Pavel I Volkov <pavelivolkov at googlemail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1126    +1 -0      ports/security/Makefile
  1.1       +37 -0     ports/security/ccsrch/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/security/ccsrch/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +13 -0     ports/security/ccsrch/files/patch-Makefile (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/security/ccsrch/pkg-descr (new)
